message:
chore: fix .codex gitignore pattern to match both file and directory forms

The existing .codex/ pattern only matches the directory form, but Codex
CLI also creates a bare .codex marker file (empty, 0 bytes). Add the
pattern without trailing slash so both forms are ignored.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -272,7 +272,8 @@ evidence/
 /test
 .bench-history/
 
-# Codex CLI config directory
+# Codex CLI ephemeral files and directories
+.codex
 .codex/
 
 # Heaptrack profiling dumps
